item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Gunbreaker's Journey IV
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned gunbreaker─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level gunbreaker to 90 and complete all job quests and tank role quests up through “A Path Unveiled.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
